Package simpaths.model

Class BenefitUnit

java.lang.Object
simpaths.model.BenefitUnit
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<BenefitUnit>, microsim.agent.Weight, microsim.event.EventListener, microsim.statistics.IDoubleSource
@Entity public class BenefitUnit extends Object implements microsim.event.EventListener, microsim.statistics.IDoubleSource, microsim.agent.Weight, Comparable<BenefitUnit>
